name: Garlic Pita Wedges
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
Place the dressing, garlic, and paprika in a blender jar.
Process until smooth. Transfer to a bowl.
Cut each pita circle into four wedges. Generously brush some of the garlic mixture on the inside of each wedge.
Place the wedges in a single layer on a dry baking sheet, brushed sides up.
Sprinkle with chopped parsley, if desired.
Bake for about 15 minutes, or until browned.
